shorts.title: ​‘The Office US’ cast: Where the Dunder Mifflin folks are now​
shorts.title_distilled: ​‘The Office US’ cast: Where the Dunder Mifflin folks are now​.
shorts.description: Over ten years since the last episode, ‘The Office US’ is still one of the all-time favorites. This mockumentary about the oddball staff at Dunder Mifflin in Scranton, Pennsylvania, first hit screens in 2005 and stuck around for nine seasons, wrapping up in 2…
shorts.content: Over ten years since the last episode, ‘The Office US’ is still one of the all-time favorites. This mockumentary about the oddball staff at Dunder Mifflin in Scranton, Pennsylvania, first hit screens in 2005 and stuck around for nine seasons, wrapping up in 2…

shorts.description: Editor's Note: This article has been updated to reflect that the victim had fallen into the Lackawanna River. SOUTH SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A man who was in critical condition after being pulled from the Lackawanna River has died. Rescue workers were alerted to the 57-year-old victim around 11:50 a.m. Thursday. Scranton Fire Chief [...]

shorts.title: Bresnahan, Meuser talk small businesses in NEPA
shorts.title_distilled: Bresnahan, Meuser talk small businesses in NEPA.
shorts.description: DICKSON CITY, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Thursday in Dickson City, state representatives Dan Meuser and Rob Bresnahan stopped by Kriger Pipeline to talk about the importance of small businesses in northeastern Pennsylvania. They spoke about current costs to own a business under the Trump administration. Rep. Bresnahan talked about fair trade, tax cuts, and just [...]

shorts.title: New non-profit location opens, tackles food insecurity
shorts.title_distilled: New non-profit location opens, tackles food insecurity.
shorts.description: DICKSON CITY, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A non-profit's mission to help families facing food insecurity is expanding in Lackawanna County. CHOP Out Hunger's Scranton branch cut the ribbon on its new facility today in Dickson City. Officials for the organization, the greater Scranton Chamber of Commerce community leaders, and volunteers were on hand to celebrate. [...]

shorts.description: SPRING BROOK TWP., LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A case of neglect is under investigation in Lackawanna County. A 63-year-old woman is currently in intensive care unit at [...]
